meta.intent: Template showing current standard authoring fields. Replace all values before using as a real level.
meta.expectedPath: Describe the intended solve path here.
meta.expectedFailMode: Describe the common failure mode here.
meta.whatItProves: Describe what this level proves about the design.
meta.notes: Optional: author notes, density exceptions, contactMode choice, spawnIntegrity exceptions, tuning deviations, or anything a reviewer needs to know.
